hook: A man who feels less alone is usually easier to date because he is no longer asking the next woman to rescue him from his whole emotional landscape.
body: Belonging creates patience, patience lowers pressure, and lower pressure makes attraction easier to trust.

hook: Some men try to hide loneliness behind confidence performance instead of building the relationships that would actually soften it.
body: Do not just manage the appearance of connection. Build the reality of it.

body: A fuller emotional life often makes romantic interest feel cleaner because it no longer has to carry every unmet need.
